minimumRadius.description: The inner radius of the cylinder region along the X and Z axes, in meters.

maximumRadius.description: The outer radius of the cylinder region along the X and Z axes, in meters.

height.description: The height of the cylinder in meters along the Y-axis, in meters.

minimumAngle.description: The minimum angle of the cylinder region in radians. In other words, this is the angle where the cylinder region starts. Must be in the range [-pi, pi].

maximumAngle.description: The maximum angle of the cylinder region in radians. In other words, this is the angle where the cylinder region ends. Must be in the range [-pi, pi].
